subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Siyyid Mihdiy-i-Dahaji
subcodes.first_line: O my Name! Yield thou praise unto God for having graciously chosen thee to be a shower of bounty for that which We have sown
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسمی ان احمد الله بما جعلناک امطار الفضل لما زرعناه فی الاراضی الطیبه
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @methods of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the power of words; of speech, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
